text: **StepPageView.swift** — takes `topInset`/`bottomInset`, reserves `topInset + 52` at the top and `bottomInset + 214` at the bottom of the content so the hero target and coach-cue pill never sit under the floating controls. The page ZStack is pinned to `.frame(maxWidth/maxHeight: .infinity)` and `.clipped()` so nothing can spill past the page bounds.
